title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the African Development Bank Act, 1983. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 15th December, 1983, vide notification No. G.S.R. 889(E), dated 14th December, 1983, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
